items.label: Site description
items.value: Synthetic example demonstrating U₀ failure mode that lumen-method alone cannot detect. 10×8 m office; 16 LED_PANEL_600 panels CLUSTERED in central 4.5×4.5 m area (4×4 grid at 1500 mm spacing centred on (4750, 4750)); perimeter rows missing. achieved_avg passes 500 target with marginal headroom; per-point min fails the 0.7× threshold + U₀ fails the 0.6 office target. INV-01 + INV-02 FAIL HIGH.

value._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 6000lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Used to demonstrate U₀ failure mode from clustered-grid spatial distribution that lumen-method INV-1 alone misses.
